since_last: 79% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.81%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 79% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.14% · BTC +1.19% · Gold -1.30% · Nasdaq100 +2.19%. 79% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.81%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.81%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.45%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.10%
cards.body: Leaders: KLAC +11.92%, AMAT +11.44%, PANW +9.06%, TSLA +8.68%, LRCX +8.47%. Laggards: HON -50.10%, SMCI -6.55%, SYNA -2.51%, DLR -1.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +7.53% at $164.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +7.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
